2605.06455.title: PrefixGuard: From LLM-Agent Traces to Online Failure-Warning Monitors
2605.06455.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM) agents now execute long, tool-using tasks where final outcome checks can arrive too late for intervention. Online warning requires lightweight prefix monitors over heterogeneous traces, but hand-authored event schemas are brittle and deployment-time LLM judging is costly. We introduce PrefixGuard, a trace-to-monitor framework with an offline StepView induction step followed by supervised monitor training. StepView induces deterministic typed-step adapters from raw trace samples, and the monitor learns an event abstraction and prefix-risk scorer from terminal outcomes. Across WebArena, $τ^2$-Bench, SkillsBench, and TerminalBench, the strongest PrefixGuard monitors reach 0.900/0.710/0.533/0.557 AUPRC. Using the strongest backend within each representation, they improve over raw-text controls by an average of +0.137 AUPRC. LLM judges remain substantially weaker under the same prefix-warning protocol. We also derive an observability ceiling on score-based area under the precision-recall curve (AUPRC) that separates monitor error from failures lacking evidence in the observed prefix. For finite-state audit, post-hoc deterministic finite automaton (DFA) extraction remains compact on WebArena and $τ^2$-Bench (29 and 20 states) but expands to 151 and 187 states on SkillsBench and TerminalBench. Finally, first-alert diagnostics show that strong ranking does not imply deployment utility: WebArena ranks well yet fails to support low-false-alarm alerts, whereas $τ^2$-Bench and TerminalBench retain more actionable early alerts. Together, these results position PrefixGuard as a practical monitor-synthesis recipe with explicit diagnostics for when prefix warnings translate into actionable interventions.
2605.06455.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理現在執行長時間的工具使用任務，其中最終結果檢查可能來得太晚，無法進行干預。線上警告需要輕量級的前綴監控器來處理異質的追蹤，但手動編寫的事件架構脆弱，並且部署時的 LLM 判斷成本高昂。我們介紹了 PrefixGuard，一個追蹤到監控的框架，包含一個離線的 StepView 引導步驟，隨後進行監控的監督訓練。StepView 從原始追蹤樣本中引導出確定性類型步驟適配器，而監控器則從終端結果學習事件抽象和前綴風險評分器。在 WebArena、$τ^2$-Bench、SkillsBench 和 TerminalBench 中，最強的 PrefixGuard 監控器達到了 0.900/0.710/0.533/0.557 的 AUPRC。使用每個表示中的最強後端，它們在原始文本控制上平均提高了 +0.137 AUPRC。在同樣的前綴警告協議下，LLM 判斷者的表現仍然顯著較弱。我們還推導出基於得分的精確-召回曲線（AUPRC）的可觀察性上限，將監控錯誤與缺乏觀察前綴證據的失敗區分開來。對於有限狀態審計，事後確定性有限自動機（DFA）提取在 WebArena 和 $τ^2$-Bench 上保持緊湊（29 和 20 個狀態），但在 SkillsBench 和 TerminalBench 上擴展到 151 和 187 個狀態。最後，首次警報診斷顯示強排名並不意味著部署效用：WebArena 排名良好，但未能支持低虛報警報，而 $τ^2$-Bench 和 TerminalBench 保留了更多可行的早期警報。總體而言，這些結果將 PrefixGuard 定位為一種實用的監控合成方案，並提供明確的診斷，以便在前綴警告轉化為可行的干預時使用。
2605.06455.author: Xinmiao Huang et.al.
2605.06455.authors: Xinmiao Huang, Jinwei Hu, Rajarshi Roy, Changshun Wu, Yi Dong, Xiaowei Huang
